scenarios.description: children() returns all Element children in insertion order when multiple Elements are present
scenarios.precondition: Element el has three mixed childNodes: Element, Element, Element
scenarios.expectedResult: Elements list of size 3, in same order as appended
pseudocode: TEST TC08 children with multiple elements

scenarios.description: children() caches the filtered child list so that subsequent calls without mutations return the same list instance
scenarios.precondition: Element el with one Element child and no intervening modifications
scenarios.expectedResult: Underlying childElementsList instance is the same on two consecutive calls
pseudocode: TEST TC09 children caching internal list
// the backing list object (not the wrapper) is cached
